vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-swarm
vBRIEFInfo.description: Issue #593 scaffold: migrator routes ROADMAP.md ## Completed items to vbrief/completed/ (not proposed/).

plan.title: migrator: ROADMAP.md Completed section items routed to vbrief/proposed/ instead of vbrief/completed/

narratives.Overview: task migrate:vbrief parses items from ROADMAP.md's ## Completed section and recognizes them as completed (visible in the migrator's own log via the (completed:...) prefix), but routes every one of them to vbrief/proposed/ instead of vbrief/completed/. The migrator has the classification information; it just doesn't use it when choosing the destination folder. Surfaced during the v0.20.0-rc.3 validation session (rc.4-candidate dogfood pass) running the post-swarm-fix migrator on deft's own repo, which has a ROADMAP.md with 165 completed items. Same recognition-without-action failure shape as #571 / #572 / #574.
narratives.Problem: Every consumer running task migrate:vbrief on a project with a ## Completed ROADMAP section ends up with all completed items mis-filed under vbrief/proposed/ (as backlog) with plan.status likely 'proposed' despite source saying completed. task project:render / task roadmap:render misreport completed work as open backlog. Deft's own repo would require 165 manual task scope:complete invocations post-migration. Silent failure: migrator exits 0 with no warning. Cutover-safety class.
narratives.Action: Fix the routing layer (likely deft/scripts/_vbrief_routing.py or deft/scripts/_vbrief_sources.py's parse_roadmap caller chain) so that when the parser tags an item as sourced from ## Completed, the router maps to vbrief/completed/ and sets plan.status='completed' (and vBRIEFInfo.updated to the migration timestamp). Active-phase items continue to route to proposed/ as today. Improve the CREATE <folder>/... log line to indicate source-section origin (e.g., 'CREATE completed/... (from ROADMAP Completed section)').
narratives.Test: New pytest fixture covering a ROADMAP with both active phase sections AND a ## Completed section. Assert post-migration: (a) all Completed-section items land in vbrief/completed/; (b) their scope vBRIEFs have plan.status='completed'; (c) all active-phase items stay in vbrief/proposed/ (no regressions). Extend the windows-task-dispatch CI job (added in #568) to run the migrator against a fixture with a ## Completed section and assert correct partition.
narratives.Outcome: Completed-section routing and status are aligned with the lifecycle folder; downstream renderers report accurate state; no manual cleanup required after migration. Migrator log lines make the routing decision auditable.

items.title: Follow directive guidelines: AGENTS.md, deft/main.md, conventional commits, task check before commit
Routing correction: items parsed from ROADMAP.md ## Completed section route to vbrief/completed/ (not vbrief/proposed/)
Status alignment: Completed-sourced scope vBRIEFs have plan.status='completed'; active-phase items keep plan.status='proposed'
Regression test: pytest fixture with active + ## Completed sections asserts partition and status for both
Windows CI coverage: extend windows-task-dispatch CI job (from #568) to run migrator against a Completed-section fixture and assert partition
Migrator log clarity: CREATE <folder>/... log line annotates source-section origin (e.g., 'from ROADMAP Completed section')

references.title: Issue #593: migrator: ROADMAP.md Completed section items routed to vbrief/proposed/ instead of vbrief/completed/
